records.ety: [OF. desbourser, F. dbourser; pref. des- (L. dis-) + bourse purse. See Burse, and cf. Dispurse.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Disbursed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Disbursing.]

defs: To pay out; to expend; -- usually from a public fund or treasury.
quotes: The duty of collecting and disbursing his revenues.
